human_view.what_was_discovered: CHIRON recovered a 'ast_skeleton' generator and PROVED it by predicting held-out terms it never saw — exact equality, not a tolerance.
human_view.why_believed: Structure-only AST skeleton: 28 nodes (identifiers/literals abstracted). Same skeleton => clone through renaming/reformatting.
human_view.what_would_falsify: A single held-out term it failed to predict would break this.
human_view.residual: the generator reproduces the surface exactly; no residual.
